scripts.test:rust: cargo test --manifest-path packages/native-rust/image/sdkwork-image-core-rust/Cargo.toml && cargo test --manifest-path packages/native-rust/image/sdkwork-image-storage-sqlx-rust/Cargo.toml && cargo test --manifest-path packages/native-rust/image/sdkwork-image-http-rust/Cargo.toml
scripts.sdk:generate:ts: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File sdks/sdkwork-image-sdk/bin/generate-sdk.ps1 -Languages typescript && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File sdks/sdkwork-image-app-sdk/bin/generate-sdk.ps1 -Languages typescript && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File sdks/sdkwork-image-backend-sdk/bin/generate-sdk.ps1 -Languages typescript
